arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe will be questioning if Man United 'went too early' by appointing Ruben Amorim, 40, claims Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has suggested that Man United part-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe will be questioning whether he made a mistake in appointing Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Manchester United's summer transfer budget could be heading for an unexpected boost
arts.sum: Man Utd need to raise funds to buy players in the summer and they could be on their way to receiving a significant transfer fee early in the window.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sack verdict given as Man Utd boss told he is the problem
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has failed to lift Manchester United into the top half of the Premier League, and the Portuguese has been slammed in the lead-up to the Europa League round of 16

arts.ttl: A ‘culture of fear’ has turned Man Utd into a tragedy - and Sir Jim Ratcliffe is the latest culprit
arts.sum: The British billionaire has overseen another round of redundancies at Old Trafford and is at risk, as Miguel Delaney argues, of prioritising financial gain over Manchester United’s infrastructure, legacy and culture

arts.ttl: Man Utd fear Hojlund could RUIN Osimhen transfer hopes
arts.sum: Only four teams have scored fewer Premier League goals than United this season and the situation has left Ruben Amorim desperate to sign a new striker in the summer, meaning Hojlund would likely be sacrificed in the process. United’s financial struggles, combined with them being set to miss out on European football next season, means that they will be unable to fund big money signings for Amorim without first selling high earners and deadwood such as Hojlund.

arts.ttl: WhoScored's Premier League Team of the Week: Mohamed Salah, Bruno Fernandes, Alexander Isak
arts.sum: It was a huge weekend in the Premier League, with plenty of twists and turns in the context of the title race and the battle for European football, and here, we’ve put together our Team of the W...

arts.ttl: Brighton and Southampton ‘sent emissaries’ – PL duo join Manchester United on Monday scouting mission
arts.sum: Brighton, Southampton and Manchester United all had their scouts in attendance at the Estádio do Dragão to watch FC Porto’s 1-1 draw against Vitória de Guimarães on Monday. That’s according to Tuesday’s edition of O Jogo, who state the league fixture ‘attracted a host’ of foreign clubs including Brighton, Southampton and Manchester United. arts.ttl: ‘Difficult to retain him’ – Manchester United given encouragement to sign player, price will be lowered
arts.sum: Manchester United were credited with an interest Morten Hjulmand before Ruben Amorim arrived at Old Trafford from Sporting in November. The Denmark international was a starter under Amorim at Sporting and maintained his place even after the manager’s exit. Last summer, Manchester United had sent a scout to follow the 25-year-old at the Euros. arts.ttl: Man United fans told they'll 'have to suffer' after club made 'mistake' with Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has endured a torrid start to life at Manchester United, winning just four of his opening 15 Premier League matches in charge of the Red Devils
